summary: Open-source usage billing infrastructure for AI and API-first companies.
editor_note: The bet is that AI pricing breaks before product-market fit does. Flexprice exposes metering, credits, hybrid plans, SDKs, MCP support, a CLI, GitHub repo, and case-study proof around 20B events/month. Unlike seat-based billing tools, it treats event streams and pricing experiments as the product surface. The risk is whether finance teams trust open-source billing when revenue recognition gets messy.

product_evidence.claim: Official product positioning describes Flexprice: Open-source usage billing infrastructure for AI and API-first companies.
Flexprice exposes metering, credits, hybrid plans, SDKs, MCP support, a CLI, GitHub repo, and case-study proof around 20B events/month.

market_context.primary_user: Developers and engineering teams evaluating build, deployment, or infrastructure workflows.
market_context.why_now: Recent source-backed funding and public product evidence make billing, usage metering, pricing worth tracking.

risks.claim: The risk is whether finance teams trust open-source billing when revenue recognition gets messy.
